texto: Then maybe it's not a question of how different we are. Maybe I've been in a hurry my whole life to experience all the things I've done and seen for a reason.""What reason?"His head turned toward hers. "To share them with you.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Rhenna Morgan que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Then maybe it's not a question of how different we are. Maybe I've been in a hurry my whole life …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, love, romance, com foco em romance e romantic.
